calendar.matters:
Petition Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Continued To Aug-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Jul-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee appeared by zoom for Jennifer Ng (petitioner).

Mrs. Yee stated that the principal day to day business of the trust is in San Francisco, that she sent out the trustee notice, that she is waiting 120-days and will distribute the assets, and that she does not think there will be any estate taxes. Mrs. Yee also stated that the trustor worked in San Francisco, that the trustor had recently purchased the property in Daly Cit with the daughter and the son-in-law, and that the trustor did not speak with her regarding title. The court informed Mrs. Yee that the purchase date is incorrect. The court accepts Mrs. Yee's representation regarding venue and suggests providing a declaration regarding the trustor's intent. The Petition Confirming Trust Assets is continued to July 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Continued To May-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
